utterances.speaker: Sarah
utterances.text: So that is two boxes of the Holiday Macaroons . On behalf of the Brown Birds of America , I salute you .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Just admit it Chandler , you have no backhand .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Excuse me little one , I have a very solid backhand .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Shielding your face and shrieking like a girl ... is not a backhand .

emotion_cause.span: 4_Shielding your face and shrieking like a girl

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I was shrieking ... like a Marine .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: All right here . Watch me execute the three P of championship play . Power . Precision . and penache .
